nasb.text: My God will cast them away Because they have not listened to Him; And they will be wanderers among the nations.

esv.text: My God will reject them because they have not listened to him; they shall be wanderers among the nations.

cnv.text: 我的　神必棄絕他們， 因為他們不聽從他； 他們必在列國中飄流。

ccb.text: 我的上帝必弃绝他们， 因为他们不听从祂。 他们必在列国中流离飘泊。
